title: Creating meeting notes in iOS?
excerpt: Hoping someone here can help. Some of my boards have the “meeting notes” column. If I have “created a new doc from template” in that column while on my desktop, I can edit the meeting notes document on my iPad (iOS app).…

posts.author: smithws (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hoping someone here can help. Some of my boards have the “meeting notes” column. If I have “created a new doc from template” in that column while on my desktop, I can edit the meeting notes document on my iPad (iOS app). However, within the iOS app, I am not able to originate/create a meeting notes doc from that column (or anywhere else for that matter).

Am I missing something or is this not a feature that is available in iOS?
